Diogo Branco holds a PhD in Informatics from the Faculty of Sciences of the University of Lisbon. His research is in the field of Human-Computer Interaction, focusing on the healthcare domain. Over the past 8 years, he has designed, developed, and evaluated applications and platforms for various healthcare domains (e.g., people with Parkinson's disease, and parents of children aged 2 to 6 with eating disorders). Diogo is currently collaborating on several projects, such as IDEA-FAST (IMI) and FoodParenting.
